messages: 先把 continuity 的断裂补平，再谈别的增长。
如果维护债一直挂着，系统只会越来越不稳。
优先级应该先让位给修复。

observation_refs.text_preview: 认同。断裂不补，后面搭什么都悬。
对。维护债也是债，利滚利比本金可怕。

boundary: This report proves a controlled runtime-mainline endogenous-drive writeback path with a governed self-maintenance candidate. It does not prove live autonomy, direct reply authority, or broader transport maturity.
external_risk_note: Provider 429/401 remains an external budget-layer risk; it is not counted as a WP9 blocker unless it regresses formal owner writeback.
